title: Host Web Foundation — Phase 3: Owner Promotions CRUD
note: Phases 1/2/4 shipped earlier (promoted to main in #1542). This state tracks the remaining Phase 3 only. Scope corrected: the protected owner-promotions tier had no GET endpoints, so Phase 3 adds them.

tasks.title: API: GET /protected/owner-promotions (owner's own list, all lifecycle states)
tasks.description: Add protectedListOwnerPromotionRoute. Lists promotions owned by the authenticated actor across ALL lifecycle states (not ACTIVE-only). Reuse OwnerPromotionService search/list but scope by actor ownerId and do not force lifecycleState=ACTIVE (the public path forces it at ownerPromotion.service.ts:133 — protected must not). Wire into protected/index.ts. Permission OWNER_PROMOTION_VIEW (or existing read perm). Add route tests (auth, owner-scope isolation, includes drafts).

tasks.title: API: GET /protected/owner-promotions/{id} (owner's own by id)
tasks.description: Add protectedGetOwnerPromotionRoute returning a single promotion owned by the actor; 404 if not found, 403 if owned by another user. Wire into protected/index.ts. Response = OwnerPromotionProtectedSchema. Add route tests (found, not-found, wrong-owner).

tasks.title: Web API layer: OwnerPromotionData type + ownerPromotionApi + transformOwnerPromotion
tasks.description: apps/web/src/lib/api/types.ts: add OwnerPromotionData (all readonly). endpoints-protected.ts: add ownerPromotionApi { list, getById, create, update, remove } mirroring hostDashboardApi. transforms.ts: add transformOwnerPromotion (Record<string,unknown> -> OwnerPromotionData, coerce dates/numbers). Unit tests for the transform.

tasks.title: Web: PromotionForm.client.tsx island (create/edit) + CSS Module
tasks.description: Native HTML form (NOT TanStack Form). Props mode 'create'|'edit' + initialData?. Validate with OwnerPromotionCreateInputSchema (create) / UpdateInputSchema (edit) via safeParse; field errors flat record, role='alert' + aria-invalid; form-error banner. Discount type select (percentage/fixed/free_night); client-side check discountValue<=100 for percentage. Handle 403 LIMIT_REACHED / missing entitlement. Submit via ownerPromotionApi. Colocated PromotionForm.module.css.

tasks.title: Web: PromotionList.client.tsx island (list + delete) + CSS Module
tasks.description: Island with loading/ready/error states (useState + useCallback + useEffect) fetching via ownerPromotionApi.list. Renders cards with title, discount, validity window, lifecycle badge, edit link, delete action (confirm). Empty state. Colocated PromotionList.module.css. i18n via createTranslations(locale).

tasks.title: Web: 3 SSR pages under [lang]/mi-cuenta/promociones/
tasks.description: index.astro (mounts PromotionList), nueva.astro (mounts PromotionForm create), [id]/editar.astro (mounts PromotionForm edit, loads initialData by id). Follow host-dashboard.astro pattern: prerender=false, locale from Astro.locals, auth guard redirect, AccountLayout with activeSection='promociones', client:load.

tasks.title: Nav + i18n: AccountLayout 'Promociones' entry + es/en/pt keys
tasks.description: AccountLayout.astro: add 'Promociones' item to the 'host' nav group (section 'promociones', path 'mi-cuenta/promociones', MegaphoneIcon). i18n: add promotions key block to packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/host.json (pageTitle, fields, discountTypes, errors, actions) + account.nav.promotions label.

tasks.title: Tests: islands + missing HostDashboard.test.tsx
tasks.description: Component tests for PromotionList.client.tsx and PromotionForm.client.tsx (render, validation errors, submit, delete). Add the Phase-2 missing apps/web/test/components/host/HostDashboard.test.tsx (render, widgets, loading/error).

tasks.title: Fix dead-link + locale-prefix quickActions hrefs
tasks.description: Confirm HostDashboard.client.tsx:60 quick-action ('mi-cuenta/promociones') resolves now. Fix hardcoded quickActions hrefs in transforms.ts (~949-953) to use buildUrl({ locale, path }) instead of bare paths.
